Uses of Package
org.apache.datafusion

Packages that use org.apache.datafusion
Package
Description
org.apache.datafusion
 
org.apache.datafusion.internal
 
  • Classes in org.apache.datafusion used by org.apache.datafusion
    Class
    Description
    ArrowReadOptions
    Configuration knobs for Arrow IPC sources passed to SessionContext.registerArrow(String, String, ArrowReadOptions) and SessionContext.readArrow(String, ArrowReadOptions).
    AvroReadOptions
    Configuration knobs for Avro sources passed to SessionContext.registerAvro(String, String, AvroReadOptions) and SessionContext.readAvro(String, AvroReadOptions).
    CacheManagerOptions
    Configuration for DataFusion's built-in CacheManager.
    CacheManagerOptions.Builder
    Builder for CacheManagerOptions.
    ColumnarValue
    The value of a scalar UDF argument or result: either a per-row ColumnarValue.Array of length rowCount, or a ColumnarValue.Scalar (length-1 vector) that the framework broadcasts.
    CsvReadOptions
    Configuration knobs for CSV sources passed to SessionContext.registerCsv(String, String, CsvReadOptions) and SessionContext.readCsv(String, CsvReadOptions).
    CsvWriteOptions
    Configuration knobs for writing CSV, passed to DataFrame.writeCsv(String, CsvWriteOptions).
    DataFrame
    A lazy representation of a query plan, mirroring the Rust DataFusion DataFrame.
    DataFusionException
    Base unchecked exception for every error surfaced from the native DataFusion side.
    FileCompressionType
    Compression of a file-format source.
    JoinType
    Join algorithm requested for DataFrame.join(org.apache.datafusion.DataFrame, org.apache.datafusion.JoinType, java.lang.String[], java.lang.String[]) / DataFrame.joinOn(org.apache.datafusion.DataFrame, org.apache.datafusion.JoinType, java.lang.String...).
    JsonWriteOptions
    Configuration knobs for writing JSON, passed to DataFrame.writeJson(String, JsonWriteOptions).
    MemoryUsage
    Snapshot of session-wide memory usage from SessionContext.memoryUsage().
    NdJsonReadOptions
    Configuration knobs for newline-delimited JSON sources passed to SessionContext.registerJson(String, String, NdJsonReadOptions) and SessionContext.readJson(String, NdJsonReadOptions).
    ObjectStoreOptions
    Description of an object_store::ObjectStore backend to register on a SessionContext's RuntimeEnv.
    ObjectStoreOptions.Gcs
    Google Cloud Storage.
    ObjectStoreOptions.Gcs.Builder
     
    ObjectStoreOptions.Http
    Listing-capable HTTP / WebDAV store.
    ObjectStoreOptions.Http.Builder
     
    ObjectStoreOptions.S3
    Amazon S3 (and any S3-compatible endpoint such as MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Wasabi).
    ObjectStoreOptions.S3.Builder
     
    ParquetReadOptions
    Configuration knobs for parquet sources passed to SessionContext.registerParquet(String, String, ParquetReadOptions) and SessionContext.readParquet(String, ParquetReadOptions).
    ParquetWriteOptions
    Configuration knobs for writing parquet, passed to DataFrame.writeParquet(String, ParquetWriteOptions).
    RuntimeStats
    Snapshot of the underlying Tokio runtime from SessionContext.runtimeStats().
    ScalarFunction
    A Java-implemented scalar SQL function.
    ScalarFunctionArgs
    Bundle of inputs passed to ScalarFunction.evaluate(org.apache.arrow.memory.BufferAllocator, org.apache.datafusion.ScalarFunctionArgs): the per-arg ColumnarValues (in declared order) and the batch row count DataFusion is driving.
    ScalarUdf
    A scalar UDF registration handle: pairs a ScalarFunction implementation with the metadata DataFusion needs to dispatch SQL calls to it.
    SessionContext
    A DataFusion session context.
    SessionContextBuilder
    Builder for a configured SessionContext.
    SortExpr
    A single sort key passed to DataFrame.sort(SortExpr...), mirroring DataFusion's expr::Sort{ expr, asc, nulls_first }.
    TableProvider
    A Java-implemented table that can be registered with a SessionContext via SessionContext.registerTable(String, TableProvider).
    UnnestOptions
    Configuration knobs for DataFrame.unnestColumns(UnnestOptions, String...), mirroring DataFusion's UnnestOptions.
    Volatility
    Volatility classification for a UDF.
  • Classes in org.apache.datafusion used by org.apache.datafusion.internal
    Class
    Description
    ScalarFunction
    A Java-implemented scalar SQL function.
    TableProvider
    A Java-implemented table that can be registered with a SessionContext via SessionContext.registerTable(String, TableProvider).
